sourceSections: AI's Rapid Transformation in Software Development: From Human to Agent-Driven Code
Strategic AI Adoption: Focusing on ROI over Cost
The Abstraction Ladder: Understanding "Loops" in AI Agent Orchestration
The Power of Advanced Models: Fable's Impact on Productivity and Model Selection
Shifting Bottlenecks: AI-Driven Solutions for Development Beyond Coding

sections.lead: AI is profoundly transforming software engineering, with many engineers, including Boris from Anthropic, now relying on it for 100% of their coding.

bullets.label: Anthropic Role
bullets.text: Boris, Head of Claude Code at Anthropic, focuses on AI developer productivity, particularly within Meta.

bullets.label: Engineer Reliance
bullets.text: A poll indicated a growing number of engineers now use AI for 100% of their coding tasks.

bullets.label: Boris's Usage
bullets.text: Boris personally states that 100% of his code has been written by Claude Code since Opus 4.5 last November, often coded on his phone.

sections.lead: Companies should prioritize AI's Return on Investment by granting broad employee access rather than focusing solely on model costs.

bullets.label: ROI Focus
bullets.text: Boris argues companies should prioritize Return on Investment (ROI) from AI models over initial cost considerations.

bullets.label: Broad Access
bullets.text: He advises giving all employees, including product managers, designers, and data scientists, access to AI tokens for broad experimentation.

bullets.label: Cost Optimization
bullets.text: Cost optimization should occur on the backend after valuable internal use cases emerge, not by restricting upfront access.

bullets.label: Anthropic ROI
bullets.text: Anthropic has seen an 8x increase in code output per engineer since the beginning of the year, demonstrating significant ROI.

sections.lead: "Loops" represent the next evolution in AI development, enabling agents to continuously prompt other agents for complex tasks.

bullets.label: Loops Defined
bullets.text: "Loops" or routines are continuous cycles where AI agents prompt other agents, moving beyond agents simply writing code.

bullets.label: Abstraction Ladder
bullets.text: This progression is likened to moving up the abstraction ladder, from programming statements to functions and now to higher-order functions.

bullets.label: Task Examples
bullets.text: Examples include an agent continuously performing code reviews or monitoring Threads feedback to automatically generate fixes.

bullets.label: Boris's Usage
bullets.text: Boris personally utilizes loops for approximately 30% of his daily coding tasks, indicating a rapidly advancing trend.

sections.lead: "Co-work" extends AI capabilities to non-engineers, automating complex multi-tool tasks with added safety guardrails.

bullets.label: Non-Engineer AI
bullets.text: Co-work is a version of Claude Code built for non-engineers on the same SDK, featuring added guardrails for safety.

bullets.label: Project Automation
bullets.text: Use cases include automating project management by having Co-work open spreadsheets, message engineers in Slack for updates, and then populate the spreadsheet.

bullets.label: Travel Booking
bullets.text: A sophisticated example involves Co-work automatically booking multi-leg travel by scanning emails and calendars and applying personal preferences, with zero human involvement post-confirmation.

sections.lead: Anthropic's Fable model offers unparalleled problem-solving capabilities, justifying its higher cost for maximum output in complex tasks.

bullets.label: Fable's Capability
bullets.text: Fable is Anthropic's new advanced model, offering a "nuance and dimensionality" comparable to Boris's smartest co-workers, similar to Opus 4.5.

bullets.label: Problem Solving
bullets.text: It excels at data analysis, debugging, and solving complex coding problems, with Boris claiming he has "run out of hard problems to give it."

bullets.label: Cost vs. Output
bullets.text: Despite Fable being more expensive and potentially slower, Boris exclusively uses it, arguing that a 1,000% return opportunity outweighs a 50% potential savings on investment.

sections.lead: AI is now addressing critical development bottlenecks beyond coding, including automated code review, security, and CI/CD optimization.

bullets.label: Shifting Bottlenecks
bullets.text: As AI handles more coding, bottlenecks are shifting upstream and downstream in the software development lifecycle.

bullets.label: Code Review
bullets.text: "Claude Code Review" automates nearly all bug detection, 98-99%, allowing human reviewers to focus on architectural aspects.

bullets.label: Security Vulnerabilities
bullets.text: "Claude Security" autonomously scans and fixes security vulnerabilities, even catching issues missed by human penetration testers.

bullets.label: CI/CD Optimization
bullets.text: Boris demonstrated Claude Code analyzing CI timings with a single prompt and generating four pull requests, reducing CI time by 50% overnight.

sections.lead: AI is transforming software development, evolving engineer roles and continuously enhancing agent capabilities with innovative features.

bullets.label: Engineer Evolution
bullets.text: Engineers' roles are evolving from manual coding to supervising AI agents and focusing on higher-level problems like product vision and distributed system design.

bullets.label: Claude Code Vision
bullets.text: Anthropic's vision for Claude Code centers on it being the most capable agent, working anywhere, and continuously improving in areas like long-running tasks, code security, quality, and alignment.

bullets.label: Automode Feature
bullets.text: "Automode" addresses prompt fatigue by having the model approve or decline commands, significantly enhancing security and enabling longer-running agents.

bullets.label: Output Styles
bullets.text: "Output styles," such as exploratory or learning, serve as powerful educational tools, helping engineers and non-coders understand and learn from AI-generated changes.
